eip_threads.title: Reduce intrinsic transaction gas
eip_threads.current_state: No recent discussion in provided meetings.

eip_threads.title: Revert creation in case of non-empty storage

thread.summary: EIP-7610 remains CFI for Glamsterdam despite unresolved implementation divergence between clients.

eip_threads.current_state: CFI status maintained but implementation inconsistencies across clients remain unaddressed.
open_questions: How will implementation divergence be resolved before mainnet?

eip_threads.title: ETH transfers and burns emit a log

thread.summary: PR pending for log address/topic decisions; clarifications needed on implementation details.

eip_threads.current_state: CFI with pending PR to finalize log address and topic design decisions.
open_questions: What address and topics will be used in the emitted logs?

eip_threads.title: Block Gas Accounting without Refunds

thread.summary: Clarified that cumulative gas should reflect block-level accounting, not user-level costs; PR under review for interaction with EIP-7623.

eip_threads.current_state: CFI with clarification that cumulative gas reflects block accounting; PR addresses EIP-7623 interaction.
open_questions: How does this interact with other gas accounting changes in the fork?

eip_threads.title: SSZ execution blocks

thread.summary: Proposed as one of the Hegotá headliner candidates.

Reth considers SSZ to have low benefit-to-work ratio; Nimbus EL prefers SSZ with Frame, acceptable without; Geth views it as not mature enough; remains under consideration pending two-week discussion.

eip_threads.current_state: Remains a headliner candidate for Hegotá, but faces skepticism from several clients about maturity and benefit-to-work ratio.
open_questions: Is the maturity level sufficient for inclusion?
What is the concrete benefit versus implementation cost?

eip_threads.title: SLOTNUM opcode

thread.summary: bal-devnet-2 scope delayed due to CL changes causing debate around EIP-7843.

eip_threads.current_state: CFI but caused delays in bal-devnet-2 due to consensus layer implementation debates.
open_questions: Have the CL implementation concerns been resolved?

eip_threads.title: Compute Gas Cost Increase
eip_threads.current_state: No recent discussion in provided meetings.

eip_threads.title: Increase Maximum Contract Size

thread.summary: Contract size limit decision pushed one week; if no progress, options narrowed to 32KB bump or nothing.
CFI'd to bump contract limit from 24KB to 32KB and initcode to 64KB; code reads scale sublinearly (128x size = 8.5x read time).
Included in DevNet-3 scope alongside EIP-8037.
Part of bal-devnet-3 launching next Wednesday; testing contract size increase.

eip_threads.current_state: CFI and included in bal-devnet-3 for testing; contract limit 32KB, initcode 64KB.

eip_threads.title: eth/70 - partial block receipt lists

thread.summary: ETH/70 CFI'd for Glamsterdam and added to DevNet-3 spec; nft-devnet-10 available for testing with multiple clients.
nft-devnet-10 testing EIP-870 P2P protocol with increased header sizes; bal-devnet-3 includes optional 870 support.

eip_threads.current_state: CFI for Glamsterdam; actively being tested in nft-devnet-10 and optional in bal-devnet-3.

eip_threads.current_state: No recent discussion in provided meetings.

eip_threads.title: Deterministic Factory Predeploy

thread.summary: CFI'd for Glamsterdam after Geth argued it's a low-complexity community ask.

eip_threads.current_state: CFI for Glamsterdam; accepted as low-complexity community request.

eip_threads.title: Backward compatible SWAPN, DUPN, EXCHANGE

thread.summary: Bitpacking vs postfix PUSH encoding decision scheduled for Monday; clients asked for feedback before then.
Push-postfix encoding change rejected; branchless normalization approach under review.

eip_threads.current_state: CFI with push-postfix encoding rejected; branchless normalization being reviewed as alternative.
open_questions: Has the branchless normalization approach been finalized?

eip_threads.title: State Creation Gas Cost Increase

thread.summary: State growth EIP-8037 decision pushed to next week due to holiday delays.
Proposes separate state gas budget tied to block gas limit; Vitalik alternative suggests static repricing (contracts 300K, storage 80K, accounts 100K); decision deferred to Monday ACDT.
Included in DevNet-3 scope alongside EIP-7954; BAL optimizations prioritized before data repricing.
Downscoped to static value increase only for devnet-3; cost_per_state_byte = 1174 at 100M block gas limit.

eip_threads.current_state: CFI and in bal-devnet-3 with simplified static pricing approach (1174 cost per state byte at 100M gas limit).
open_questions: Will the full separate state gas budget approach be reconsidered later?

eip_threads.title: State-access gas cost update
eip_threads.current_state: No recent discussion in provided meetings.

eip_threads.title: Sparse Blobpool
eip_threads.current_state: No recent discussion in provided meetings.

eip_threads.title: Universal Enshrined Encrypted Mempool

thread.summary: Proposed as one of four EL headliner candidates for Hegotá.
EIP-8105 withdrawn by champions who now endorse Lucid as the consolidated encrypted mempool proposal.

eip_threads.current_state: Withdrawn; champions have consolidated support behind Lucid encrypted mempool proposal.

eip_threads.title: Frame Transaction

thread.summary: Proposed as Hegotá headliner candidate; Approve propagation redesigned for proxy compatibility.

Main debate centers on Frame vs no EL headliner; Geth prefers Frame; Besu considers it acceptable; Erigon likes it; Nethermind finds it too complex; Reth considers it over-engineered; Nimbus prefers it with SSZ but acceptable alone; removes protocol signature requirements entirely and enables privacy pools without centralized relayers.

eip_threads.current_state: Leading headliner candidate with mixed client support; removes protocol signature requirements and enables privacy pools.
open_questions: Is the complexity justified by the benefits?
Can consensus be reached before the March 12 deadline?

eip_threads.title: eth/71 - Block Access List Exchange

thread.summary: ETH/71 CFI'd for Glamsterdam alongside ETH/70.
bal-devnet-2 testing local access lists; optional 871 support in bal-devnet-3.

eip_threads.current_state: CFI for Glamsterdam; being tested in bal-devnet-2 and optionally available in bal-devnet-3.
